name: Queso Fundido w/ Queso Blanco Cheese & Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Slowly melt the Queso Blanco in the microwave or over a low flame.
2. Stir continuously with a wooden spoon until melted.
3. When almost melted, add the garlic, lime juice, and Tabasco.
4. Heat through completely.
5. Place shrimp on skewers and dip into the cheese mixture.
